fields.title: Introduction to Project Management & Project Charter
fields.key_concepts:
• Project charter formally authorizes a project
• Defines project objectives and scope
• Identifies key stakeholders
fields.best_practices:
• Ensure alignment with business goals
• Get stakeholder buy-in early
• Keep it clear and concise

fields.text: What is the primary purpose of a project charter?
fields.explanation: A project charter formally authorizes the project and provides the project manager with the authority to apply organizational resources to project activities.
